name: "A" Cell Recombination Device
name_jp: 「<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>」<ruby lang="jp"><rb>細</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>胞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>組</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>み<ruby lang="jp"><rb>換</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>え<ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>置</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; send 1 "Alien" monster from your Deck to the Graveyard, and if you do, place A-Counters on that monster equal to the Level of the sent monster. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the Graveyard: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; add 1 "Alien" monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; send 1 "Alien" monster from your Deck to the Graveyard, and if you do, place A-Counters on that monster equal to the Level of the sent monster. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the Graveyard: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; add 1 "Alien" monster from your Deck to your hand.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
